summary: Deterministic doctor, doctor status, runner readiness, schema, and skill-disclosure tests cover the read-only readiness implementation, assessment packet surface, freshness rules, progressive Cautilus Agent surface, and durable runner assessment boundary.

covered: doctor and doctor status expose runner readiness as read-only setup state without treating missing assessments as adapter failure.
The runner assessment schema and examples provide a packet-shaped scaffold instead of requiring operators to author the packet from prose alone.
Assessment repoCommit drift is exposed as provenance-only head drift when adapter and runner file hashes still match, while adapter or runner file hash changes stale the assessment.
Product-proof runner assessments require verification capability evidence before doctor or doctor status can present the runner as ready.
The Cautilus Agent skill remains one progressive surface, with command discovery delegated to the binary and runner readiness handled as setup/readiness sequencing.
notClaimed: This bundle does not prove a host app runner is semantically honest for a specific consumer repository.
This bundle does not run live product behavior; it verifies the generic readiness and packet contracts.

outputSummary: source and packaged Cautilus Agent skills under the 180 nonempty line cap
required fragments present and forbidden split-surface fragments absent

checkedInEvidence.proves: Read-only runner readiness visibility, assessment freshness, provenance-only commit drift, stable next-branch shape, typed runners, and verification capability blocking.
Eval and improve consume runner readiness as durable assessment-backed proof instead of accepting self-certified runtime labels.
CLI doctor output orients operators toward runner assessment and preserves Cautilus Agent readiness as one surface.
doctor status emits a read-only orientation packet with runner readiness, adapter, skill surface, claim state, and safe branch choices without launching eval, review, improve, or commits.
A concrete operator-copyable runner assessment scaffold exists for cautilus.runner_assessment.v1.
The source and packaged Cautilus Agent skills keep one progressive agent surface and avoid split discover/eval/improve/runner skill framing.

decision.reason: The checked-in tests and disclosure scanner exercise the runner readiness packet implementation, doctor/status orientation, schema/example scaffold, assessment freshness and verification capability gates, and Cautilus Agent progressive-surface boundary.
